name: 6.6x4_4
x_algo: x*key_1u + (3 if x > 5 or (x == 5 and y == 4) else 0)
y_algo: -y*key_1u - (12 if x == 0 else (10 if x == 1 else (2 if x == 2 else ((x-3)*4 if x >= 4 else 0))))
z_algo: 30-(x*2)-(y*2) if x > 5 or (x == 5 and y == 4) else 10+ abs(y-2)*3 - (2 if x == 2 else 5 if x == 3 else 2 if x == 4 else -2 if x == 0 else 0)
y_rot_algo: 8 if x > 5 or (x == 5 and y == 4) else 0
x_rot_algo: (y-1)*4 if x > 5 or (x == 5 and y == 4) else 10 if y == 0 else 5 if y == 1 else -5 if y == 3 else 0
z_rot_algo: -2*x if x > 5 or (x == 5 and y == 4) else 0
sf_cmt: skirt_flange adds a border around the keyplate.
sp_cmt: skirt_profile defines the shape of the skirt. It is a list of points, each with a fraction and either an angle or an out value. The fraction is the distance along the skirt, normalised by fractional share. The angle is the angle of the skirt at that point, in degrees. The out value is the distance from the keyplate to the skirt at that point, in mm.
